title: `podman container runlabel` instead of `podman runlabel`
body:
### Issue Description

RELEASE_NOTES.md contains several `podman runlabel`.  This command does not exist.  It should be `podman container runlabel`.

### Steps to reproduce the issue

Not applicable.
